title: Interaction of two celestial bodies and the nature of centrifugal forces
author: Khmelnik, Solomon
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: An algorithm for calculating the trajectories of two celestial bodies is considered    a consequence of their interaction of bodies by centrifugal and gravitational forces. It is shown that, in this case, they exchange flows of gravitational and kinetic energy.
steps_raw: An algorithm for calculating the trajectories of two celestial bodies is considered    a consequence of their interaction of bodies by centrifugal and gravitational forces. It is shown that, in this case, they exchange flows of gravitational and kinetic energy.
